name: Salmon Vegetable Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Flake the salmon and remove any bones.
2. Combine the flaked salmon with mashed potatoes, cooked beans, diced onions, and melted butter in a large bowl.
3. Season the mixture to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Mix until well blended.
5. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until just incorporated.
6. Transfer the mixture to a well-oiled baking dish.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (400°F) until puffy and lightly browned.
8. Serve immediately with sour pickles and tartare or tomato sauce.
Mrs. Zola Simonsen, Emery, UT
The Household Searchlight Recipe Book (1934)
